Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. The 16th Houston Film Critics Society Awards were announced on February 18, 2023, at the Midtown Arts & Theater Center Houston (MATCH) in Texas. The nominations were announced on January 10, 2023, with The Banshees of Inisherin and Everything Everywhere All at Once leading the nominations with nine each. Both films won the most awards with three each, with Everything Everywhere All at Once winning Best Picture. The nominees for the Texas Independent Film Award were announced on December 7, 2022.Hosted by local film critics and film industry notables, the event featured live, abridged performances of the five Best Original Song nominees, which went to "Naatu Naatu" from RRR, and the awarding of the Texas Independent Film Award. "As the industry continues to debate how we should experience
B. The Houston Film Critics Society presented its 16th annual awards ceremony on February 18, 2023. This event took place at the Midtown Arts & Theater Center Houston (MATCH), located in Texas. The nominations for these awards had been revealed earlier, specifically on January 10, 2023. Two films, *The Banshees of Inisherin* and *Everything Everywhere All at Once*, stood out by receiving the highest number of nominations, each securing nine. Ultimately, both of these highly recognized films achieved the most victories, with each taking home three awards. Notably, *Everything Everywhere All at Once* was honored with the prestigious Best Picture award. Furthermore, the list of nominees for the Texas Independent Film Award had been made public on December 7, 2022. The ceremony itself was guided by local film critics and prominent figures from the film industry. A highlight of the evening included live, shortened renditions of the five nominated songs for Best Original Song, with "Naatu Naatu" from the film *RRR* ultimately winning this category. The event also included the presentation of the Texas Independent Film Award. A statement made during the proceedings noted, "As the industry continues to debate how we should experience
C. At the Midtown Arts & Theater Center Houston (MATCH) in Texas, the 16th Houston Film Critics Society Awards were held on February 18, 2023. The announcement was made on January 10, 2023, and The Banshees of Inisherin and Everything Everywhere All At Once were nominated with nine each. They won the most awards with three each, while Everything Everywhere All At Once won the Best Picture award. The Texas Independent Film Award was announced on December 7, 2022, when the five Best Original Song nominees were presented by the featured nominated by R
